# H1 Concurrency CV — Stardust (2026-06-27)

Run 2: aggregate_tok_s=6.67
Run 3: aggregate_tok_s=6.67

H1_MEAN=6.6667
H1_STDEV=0.0058
H1_CV=0.0009
H1_PASS=yes (criterion CV <= 0.15)

# H2 order stability — Stardust

H2_REVERSED=6.67
